name: White Chocolate Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler, melt the white chocolate and set aside to cool slightly.
2. Beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
3. Add the egg yolks, one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Mix in the sour cream, vanilla extract, and melted white chocolate, then set aside.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites with a pinch of cream of tartar until they form stiff peaks.
5. Gradually add sugar to the beaten egg whites, beating until stiff.
6. Gently fold 1/3 of the egg white mixture into the chocolate mixture to lighten it.
7. Fold in the remaining egg white mixture.
8. Pour the batter into a pan lined with graham cracker crumbs and place in a water bath.
9. Bake at 325°F (160°C) until set, about 1 hour to 2 hours.
Note: Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before beginning.
